observations: runx CLI version: runx-cli 0.6.14 (publish, install, dogfood, and verify were all run with this binary).
Publisher owner: epistemedeus. Package name: secret-catcher (exact). Version: 0.1.0.
Pull request against runxhq/runx (pr_url): https://github.com/runxhq/runx/pull/236. Head commit: d484d2fa1784ec77be6d15176366544ff223c74a.
Raw X.yaml from the PR head commit: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/epistemedeus/runx/d484d2fa1784ec77be6d15176366544ff223c74a/skills/secret-catcher/X.yaml.
Raw SKILL.md from the PR head commit: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/epistemedeus/runx/d484d2fa1784ec77be6d15176366544ff223c74a/skills/secret-catcher/SKILL.md.
Publish method: runx login --provider github --for publish; runx registry publish ./skills/secret-catcher/SKILL.md --registry https://api.runx.ai.
Local harness (pre-publish): status=passed (3/3, 0 assertion errors), cases=[planted-secret-blocks:sealed, clean-diff-does-not-block:sealed, refuses-to-apply-redaction:failure], receipts=2.
Hosted registry harness (post-publish): green — the registry publish gate runs the hosted harness and requires a stop/error case; the refuses-to-apply-redaction case satisfies it.

Dogfood command: runx skill epistemedeus/secret-catcher@sha-57996f6d5e77 --registry https://api.runx.ai --input-json diff='<planted diff>' --input-json scan_context='{"repo":"acme/api","pr":101}' --receipt-dir <dir> -j.

Dogfood receipt_ref (post-publish run of epistemedeus/secret-catcher@sha-57996f6d5e77, not a harness fixture seal): runx:receipt:sha256:dde605e431d3eed9a4ac4835e293cf5c136bf87b1c875d327dcfa253b504d7ee.
runx verify verdict on the dogfood receipt: valid.
Block decision on the dogfood input: block=true. Finding types: [aws_access_key_id, aws_secret_access_key]. Locations: config/prod.env:2:19; config/prod.env:3:23.
Clean path: a diff whose added lines only reference credentials via environment variables and placeholders yields zero findings and block=false (harness case clean-diff-does-not-block).
No raw secret value appears in any finding, artifact, or sealed receipt: each span carries a redacted preview and a one-way SHA-256 fingerprint, and the runner fails closed otherwise.

New-user path: install with 'runx add epistemedeus/secret-catcher@sha-57996f6d5e77 --registry https://api.runx.ai', run 'runx skill epistemedeus/secret-catcher@sha-57996f6d5e77 --registry https://api.runx.ai --input-json diff='<planted diff>' --input-json scan_context='{"repo":"acme/api","pr":101}' --receipt-dir <dir> -j', and verify the sealed receipt with 'runx verify --receipt receipt.json --json'. verification.json records the public key so verification needs no private context.

dogfood.input: a unified diff that adds config/prod.env containing AWS's documented example access key and secret key
